com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job

Class BatchExecuteJobImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.BatchExecuteJobImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BatchExecuteJob, Job
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecuteCampaignJobImpl, ExecuteControlJobImpl

    public abstract class BatchExecuteJobImpl
extends JobImpl
implements BatchExecuteJob
    A execution job for staring a control part.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 18
